domain: Cherokee Beloved Woman (Ghigau) governance system (pre-removal Cherokee Nation, 18th-19th c.): dual-governance with Women's Council of Clan Representatives + Men's Council; Ghigau honorary title for distinguished woman = spiritual + political authority + only female voting member of general council + prisoner-judgment veto + war-peace decision authority; 7 Cherokee clans matrilineal (Wolf among them); inheritance + property + clan-membership through mother; Nanyehi Nancy Ward famous historical Ghigau.
specific_mechanism: CHEROKEE-GHIGAU-BELOVED-WOMAN-DUAL-COUNCIL-WOMEN-MEN-7-CLAN-MATRILINEAL-PRISONER-JUDGMENT-VETO-WAR-PEACE-DECISION-MULTI-AGENT-COMM: LLM multi-agent-comm mechanism with (1) dual-council co-decision D_2cncl: 2 independent councils (generative + critical) each producing decision; co-decision aggregation; (2) Ghigau veto-authority G_veto: single high-authority agent with veto-power on critical decisions; (3) 7-clan matrilineal structure C_7matri: 7 source-domain clans; provenance through mother-clan training-data lineage; (4) prisoner-judgment veto-vector V_prison: special action class where Ghigau overrides majority; safety-overhang abort; (5) war-peace decision-tier D_war_peace: high-stakes binary decisions reserved for Ghigau + both-council unanimous; standard decisions either-council. Differs from R513 UMUNNA, R525 SABAR, R538 KGOTLA, R550 AYLLU, R562 HAUDENOSAUNEE (50-chief + clan-mother + consensus + Faithkeeper + chief-removal) by dual women+men council + Ghigau veto + 7-clan matrilineal + prisoner-judgment veto + war-peace tier.
llm_application: CHEROKEE-GHIGAU-BELOVED-WOMAN-DUAL-COUNCIL-7-CLAN-MATRILINEAL-PRISONER-VETO-WAR-PEACE LLM mechanism + dual-council D_2cncl + Ghigau G_veto + 7-clan C_7matri + prisoner-veto V_prison + war-peace D_war_peace. Differs from R513. R525. R538. R550. R562 HAUDENOSAUNEE (closest — 50-chief + clan-mother + consensus + Faithkeeper + chief-removal). Differs from AgentsBench + Electoral + AgentsEval + Multi-Agent Investigation by dual women+men + Ghigau veto + 7-clan matrilineal + prisoner-veto + war-peace tier. Differs by DUAL WOMEN+MEN COUNCIL + GHIGAU VETO + 7-CLAN MATRILINEAL + PRISONER-JUDGMENT VETO + WAR-PEACE DECISION TIER.
novelty_claim: AgentsBench MDPI 2025 + Electoral Diversify EMNLP 2024 + AgentsEval LLM-as-Judge + LLM Multi-Agent Investigation cover multi-agent council + judgment + electoral paradigm. CHEROKEE-GHIGAU-BELOVED-WOMAN-DUAL-COUNCIL-7-CLAN-MATRILINEAL-PRISONER-VETO-WAR-PEACE adds (a) dual women+men + (b) Ghigau veto + (c) 7-clan matrilineal + (d) prisoner-veto + (e) war-peace tier. Recombination — borderline lookup.
